failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    f.origin_profile_id AS profile_id
FROM profile_relationship f
JOIN profile target ON f.destination_profile_id = target.id
WHERE target.username = 'haight_clothing'
AND f.edge = 'follows'
ORDER BY (SELECT num_followers FROM profile WHERE id = f.origin_profile_id) DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT
    p.id AS profile_id
FROM profile p
JOIN profile_relationship pr ON p.id = pr.origin_profile_id
JOIN profile target ON pr.destination_profile_id = target.id
WHERE target.username = 'haight_clothing'
  AND pr.edge = 'follows'
ORDER BY p.num_followers DESC
LIMIT 10;

    p.id AS profile_id
FROM profile p
JOIN profile_relationship pr ON p.id = pr.origin_profile_id
